The Line Downtown

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze the relationship the teacher establishes between what he says about every right and what he says the hard part of civic reasoning is. Explain how he uses one to define the other.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 12.2  |  HS Civics & Economics Grade 12: Scope and Limits of Rights and Obligations of Democratic Citizens
